name: VNUE, Inc.
summary: PART I . Business Overview We are a music technology company that utilizes our platforms to record live concerts and commercializes the content by making the content immediately available for purchase through our website and the website at Set.fm, a technology platform that enables musical artists to capture, promote and sell high-fidelity recordings instantly.
